div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show consent_mgmt_alert
alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show consent_mgmt_alert
div.t: You are not allowed to manage portal users or roles.
Name, login, and password are required for portal users.
That login is already in use.
Portal role could not be created.
Portal role could not be updated.
Portal user could not be created.
Portal user could not be updated.

div.p: Review role hierarchy, assigned-user counts, and open a popup to inspect or update a role.

t.div: No portal roles have been created yet.

div.p: See who belongs to the portal, their manager, assigned roles, and contact details relevant to this module.

t.div: No portal users found for this consent partner.

div.div: Create a role and place it in the consent portal hierarchy.
Create a portal user, assign roles, and place them in the hierarchy.

div.label: Roles
div.div: Open the dropdown and tick multiple roles as needed.

div.label: Can create users and manage roles/hierarchy

div.div: View role details and update the hierarchy information.
View user details and update contact, hierarchy, and role assignments.

input.name: password
input.placeholder: Leave blank to keep current password

div.label: Roles

input.name: role_ids
input.t-att-checked: 'checked' if role_option.id in portal_user.consent_portal_role_ids.ids else None

div.div: Open the dropdown and tick multiple roles as needed.

div.label: Can create users and manage roles/hierarchy
